zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Joinville於1131年之後出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾時，她的父親Roger de Joinville8907歲，母親Aldéarde de Vignory8904歲。她和Gerhard II von Vaudémont至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1181年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內可利蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Joinville was born after 1131, in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Roger de Joinville, was 8907 and her mother, Aldéarde de Vignory, was 8904. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gerhard II von Vaudémont. She died in 1181, in Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Joinville est née après 1131, à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Roger de Joinville, avait 8907 ans et sa mère, Aldéarde de Vignory, avait 8904 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Gerhard II von Vaudémont. Elle est décédée en 1181, à Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Joinville nach 1131 in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Joinville 8907 und ihre Mutter Aldéarde de Vignory 8904. Sie hatte mit Gerhard II von Vaudémont mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1181 in Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Joinville è nata il dopo il 1131 nel Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Roger de Joinville, aveva 8907 anni e sua madre, Aldéarde de Vignory, aveva 8904 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Gerhard II von Vaudémont. Morì nel 1181, nel Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Joinvilleが1131年以後にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルで生まれた時，父Roger de Joinvilleは8907歳，母Aldéarde de Vignoryは8904歳であった。彼女はGerhard II von Vaudémontとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1181年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンクレフモントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Joinville(이)가 1131년 이후 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Joinville(은)는 8907세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aldéarde de Vignory(은)는 8904세였다. 그녀는 Gerhard II von Vaudémont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 클레프몽에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Joinville nasceu após 1131, em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Roger de Joinville, tinha 8907 anos e sua mãe, Aldéarde de Vignory, tinha 8904 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Gerhard II von Vaudémont. Ela faleceu em 1181, em Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Joinville родилась после 1131 г. в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Roger de Joinville было 8907 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldéarde de Vignory, 8904. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Gerhard II von Vaudémont. Она умерла в 1181 г. в местности клефмонт, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Joinville nació después de 1131, en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Roger de Joinville, tenía 8907 años y su mamá, Aldéarde de Vignory, tenía 8904 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Gerhard II von Vaudémont. Murió en 1181, en Clefmont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
